External database

Use approved database connectors to browse reference data or sync Excel sheets into SQL Server.

DB Browse safely

Preview connector rows without changing production data. Search before exporting CSV.

XL Sync from Excel

Upload a controlled sheet, choose the worksheet, and push it through the configured connector.

OK Admin governed

Connectors are available only when admins grant module access and configure the destination.

Connector workspace

Select a connector, then choose whether you want to browse data or sync a sheet.

No external database connectors are assigned to your account.

Browse connector data

Search live rows and export a CSV when you need a copy.

Sync Excel to connector

Upload the approved file, pick a sheet, then start the sync.

Upload the approved workbook for this connector.

Before syncing: confirm column names, remove empty header rows, and make sure the connector owner expects this update.
